plan.reasoning: SMILES consistency check: The SMILES is [NH2], representing NH2• with a radical on N (index 0, symbol N, hybridization SP3, radical_electrons 1). This matches a reactive species. No hybridization mismatch with user description. Radical confirmed for ReactiveSpecies. History is None, so this is the first attempt. No previous successes, failures, or slips. User intent: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration systematically. Adsorbate analysis: Single heavy atom N at index 0 with unpaired electron, suitable for monodentate binding via N. Surface analysis: Available sites include ontop on Re, bridge on Re-Re, hollow-3 on Re-Re-Ti, hollow-4 on Re-Re-Re-Ti. Start with the simplest and likely stable site: ontop on Re, binding via N (index 0). This is a new plan. adsorbate_type: ReactiveSpecies since it has a radical.
